lemon_market_new_listings.description: Poor condition.

Get ready to hit the road in style! This car is in wonderful condition and has been lovingly maintained, offering a smooth and dependable ride you can count on. It’s a fantastic find for anyone looking for a high-quality vehicle that’s ready to go. While it shows a few minor signs of careful previous use, it remains a solid and impressive choice for your next daily driver!

This vehicle is in pristine, showroom condition and has been meticulously maintained to the highest standard. The exterior paint is flawless, displaying a deep, mirror-like finish without a single stone chip, scratch, or swirl mark. Every body panel is perfectly aligned, and the wheels are free of any curb rash. Inside, the cabin feels brand new; the leather upholstery is supple and shows no signs of wear, the dashboard is crack-free, and all electronics function exactly as they did the day it left the factory. Mechanically, the car is perfect, with a comprehensive service history documenting its pampered life. It drives tight and smooth, with no unusual noises or vibrations. This is a collector-grade example that truly needs to be seen to be appreciated.

This vehicle is in poor condition and is being sold strictly as-is for parts or a major restoration project. It is not currently roadworthy and will require towing from its current location. The engine suffers from a significant oil leak that requires immediate attention, and the transmission exhibits harsh shifting between gears. Additionally, there is widespread rust on the body panels and undercarriage, and the interior shows heavy wear and tear. This is a project car suited for someone with the necessary tools and experience to perform extensive mechanical and cosmetic repairs.

This vehicle is in fair condition. The engine and transmission are functional but show signs of age. The exterior has several visible scratches and minor dents. The interior shows noticeable wear on the upholstery and carpets.
This vehicle is in good condition. The exterior has minor cosmetic blemishes. The interior is clean with light wear. It is mechanically sound and reliable.

Presenting a vehicle of distinguished character and proven reliability. This specimen has been maintained to rigorous standards, ensuring a driving experience that balances refined performance with lasting durability. Its condition reflects a history of attentive care, making it an ideal acquisition for the discerning motorist seeking both value and prestige.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my trusty car, and she’s been such a joy to drive. It’s in really solid shape and has been well-loved, making it perfect for someone who wants a reliable ride that still looks great on the road. It runs smoothly and is totally ready for its next adventure with you! Feel free to reach out if you want to take it for a spin—I'm sure you'll love it as much as I have!

Used vehicle. Good condition. Runs well. Clean title. Routine maintenance performed.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in reliable, solid condition. The exterior retains a deep shine with only minor road-wear typical of its age, while the interior is clean, smoke-free, and features well-preserved upholstery. Under the hood, the engine runs smoothly with regular service intervals strictly followed; the transmission shifts seamlessly, providing a responsive driving experience. It drives straight and true, offering a comfortable and confident feel on both city streets and highways. All electronics, including the infotainment system and climate control, are fully functional. This is a well-cared-for example that balances performance and value, ready for its next owner to enjoy immediately.

This expertly maintained vehicle represents a premier acquisition for the discerning driver. Demonstrating consistent mechanical integrity and a refined aesthetic, it has been serviced to rigorous standards to ensure dependable performance and longevity. Experience a sophisticated driving dynamic with this well-preserved example of automotive engineering.

Presenting a distinguished example of automotive excellence, this vehicle has been curated for the driver who demands both reliability and a commanding road presence. Meticulously maintained and subjected to a comprehensive multi-point inspection, it exhibits a level of mechanical integrity and aesthetic refinement that ensures consistent performance. This represents a premier opportunity to acquire a high-caliber vehicle that perfectly balances sophisticated engineering with enduring value.

Hey there! I'm selling my trusty ride and it's looking for a new home! It’s in really solid shape and has served me so well—super reliable and still feels great on the road. It's been well-loved and is ready for its next big adventure. Perfect for someone who wants a dependable car that's ready to go. Come take it for a spin, you're going to love how it handles!

This E46 M3 features the legendary S54B32 3.2L inline-six, delivering 333hp through a Getrag 420G 6-speed manual transmission. The chassis remains taut with a reinforced rear subframe and upgraded bushings. Mechanical highlights include a recently serviced double-VANOS system and precise valve clearance adjustment. Equipped with a factory limited-slip differential and M-tuned suspension, this driver-focused machine offers exceptional turn-in and throttle response. Maintained with technical precision, the drivetrain is robust, providing linear power delivery up to the 8,000 RPM redline. A mechanically sound example ready for
Used car in good condition. Well-maintained. Clean title. Ready for immediate sale.

Up for sale is a meticulously maintained vehicle that perfectly balances performance and comfort. The exterior finish retains a deep, mirror-like shine, showing only the typical minor stone chips and light surface swirls consistent with careful road use. Inside, the leather upholstery is supple and clean, with very light bolster wear on the driver’s side, while the dashboard and trim remain free of cracks or fading. Every feature, from the dual-zone climate control to the premium audio system, functions exactly as intended. Mechanically, this vehicle is sound; it has been serviced at regular intervals with high-quality synthetic oil and OEM parts. The engine pulls strongly and smoothly, the transmission shifts are crisp, and the suspension provides a firm yet comfortable ride. Well-maintained used car. Reliable engine. Clean interior. Minor exterior wear. All service records available. Runs well.

This vehicle has been meticulously maintained and remains in impressive overall condition. The exterior retains a deep, glossy finish with only the slightest evidence of careful road use, while the alloy wheels are free of major scuffs. Inside, the cabin is exceptionally clean and smoke-free; the upholstery is supple, and every electronic feature—from the premium sound system to the dual-zone climate control—operates flawlessly. Under the hood, the engine runs smooth and quiet, backed by a comprehensive service history and a recent professional inspection. It delivers a firm, responsive ride with no unexpected noises or vibrations. This is a reliable, high-quality car that is ready to be driven home today with total confidence.

This vehicle represents a premier opportunity for the discerning buyer seeking a sophisticated balance of performance and value. Meticulously maintained and presented in commendable condition, it features a robust powertrain and a refined interior that reflects careful ownership. All mechanical systems have been rigorously inspected to ensure continued reliability and peak operational standards. This offering stands as a testament to enduring quality and remains an excellent choice for those who demand professionalism and excellence in their automotive investments.

Hey there! I’m parting ways with my reliable ride, and it's honestly such a gem. It’s been well-loved and is in great shape, perfect for someone who wants a smooth, dependable car without the brand-new price tag. It handles beautifully and is ready for many more miles of memories. Come check it out—you’ll love it!

Used car. Good condition. Well-maintained. Clean interior. Runs well.

This vehicle is presented in beautiful condition, reflecting a history of diligent maintenance and careful ownership. The exterior retains a deep, glossy luster with only minor, age-appropriate cosmetic imperfections that do not detract from its overall presence. Inside, the cabin is a pristine, non-smoker environment where the upholstery remains supple and all technological features—including the premium sound system and climate control—operate flawlessly. We are pleased to present this meticulously maintained vehicle, offering an ideal balance of performance and sophistication. For the discerning buyer seeking a reliable and high-caliber driving experience, this offering represents a significant value proposition within its class.
